title: Landscaped
description: This Mod Adds 15+ New Paintings to Minecraft with More Coming in the Future!
body:
# Landscaped
**This Mod Adds 15+ New Paintings to Minecraft with More Coming in the Future!**

**Painting Theme Variety**\
This Mod Has a ton Of Theme Variety for The Paintings, Not Just Traditional Paintings!

## Important Info

This Mod is maintained only for 1.19.2 and up and no Backporting To An Older version

> **Supported Versions** Not Backporting Below 1.19.2
> ### Fabric & Quilt
> * 1.20.X **(Full Support)**
> ### Forge
> * 1.19.2 **(Full Support)**
> * 1.19.4 **(Full Support)**
> * 1.20.1 **(Full Support)**
> ### NeoForge
> * 1.20.1 **(Full Support)**
> * 1.20.4 **(Planned)**

**REUPLOADING THIS MOD IS FORBIDDEN!!** 

### Project Members

- ErzeKawek (Lead Dev/Owner)
